heroLead: A cross-platform focus timer for your desktop. Always-on-top overlay, GitHub-style heatmap stats, timer profiles, system tray, and global hotkeys.

about.title: About the product
about.desc: The Pomodoro technique works when the timer helps instead of getting in the way. Memora Pomodoro lives above all windows as a thin overlay, counts your sessions, and shows progress with a clear heatmap. No subscriptions, no cloud — everything is stored locally on your device.

features.title: Features
features.f5: Import history from YAPA, local storage

howTo.title: How to Start
howTo.step1: Download the build for your operating system
howTo.step3: Pick a timer profile and press start
howTo.step4: Track your progress on the session heatmap
